name: Savory Cheese Scones
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Combine all dry ingredients, stir in cheeses and toss well. Cut in butter. Combine eggs and milk, add to flour mixture and gently knead to form a stiff dough. Cut dough ball into halves and pat each half into an 8-inch diameter, 1/2-inch thick circle. Cut into wedges, place wedges on a baking sheet and bake for 15 to 17 minutes, until lightly browned.
